channel.title: flove making-of — social questions
channel.description: New social design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Is the social app standalone or integrated into MyNet?
item.description:
• Standalone apps/social.html — Separate app — can be accessed independently, linked from other apps. More discoverable. • Profily-integrated MyNet — Social is just a section within nety's MyNet tab. Tighter integration, less duplication. • Both — MyNet has social, but there's also a standalone entry point. More code but maximum flexibility.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Profily-integrated MyNet
